allow: Bash(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv, find_dotenv; p = find_dotenv\(\); print\('Found .env at:', p\); load_dotenv\(p\); import os; url=os.environ.get\('SUPABASE_URL','NOT SET'\); key=os.environ.get\('SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY','NOT SET'\); print\('URL:', url\); print\('Key starts with:', key[:15] if key != 'NOT SET' else 'NOT SET'\)")
